content: Welcome to the general channel everyone!
Thanks Bob! Glad to be here.
Hey all - quick question about the onboarding doc?
Sure thing - I can walk you through it.
Reminder: all-hands meeting tomorrow at 10am.
Will there be a recording for those who can't attend?
Anyone tried that new coffee place on 5th?
Yes! The cold brew is amazing.
Adding it to my list for this week.
Q3 roadmap draft is ready for review.
Looks good - left a few comments on the doc.
Sprint retro notes have been uploaded.
Can we discuss the velocity drop next standup?
Agreed - I think the new estimation process might be a factor.
Should we move this conversation to a named channel?
Good idea - let me set one up.
Can you review my PR when you get a chance?
On it - will have feedback by EOD.
Hey - are you free for a quick sync?
Sent you the updated design files.
Thanks for the help earlier!
